comment.body:
VIX, depends on the environment.
covered in the post.
Speed was symetrical. 
long speed down, short speed up = as said, traders long vol into both direction.
but bcs we are structurally under pressure, we would have needed to see persistent vol selling to stabilize there up there. Didn't play out, move was taken back.

gamma, speed in itself don't indicate anything!

zomme is different, that volatility/gamma derivative, do not bring it here :))
comment.raw_body:
VIX, depends on the environment.
covered in the post.

long speed down, short speed up = as said, traders long vol into both direction.
but bcs we are structurally under pressure, we would have needed to see persistent vol selling to stabilize there up there. Didn't play out, move was taken back.

gamma, speed in itself don't indicate anything!

zomme is different, that volatility/gamma derivative, do not bring it here :))
